title: Write the first execution plan
summary: Turn the brief into an executable plan with concrete slices and a clear design direction.
acceptance: The next build slices are explicit and sequenced with real dependencies.
The primary user flow and visual direction are concrete enough to implement without generic AI styling.
Open questions are reduced to a small list of explicit decisions.
notes: Keep the plan short enough that the loop can actually execute it.
When UI matters, describe empty, loading, error, and success states.
